title: After 10 Years, I Found the Perfect EMA Settings! It Shows Exact Signals!
thesis_bullets: I want to teach you an excellent EMA settings and combination that helps you find accurate buy sell signals.
This trading strategy can make you consistent profit.
Alright we're gonna add 6 exponential moving averages to the chart and we're gonna give them some special settings and combination.
First we add 3 EMAs and then another 3 EMAs.
Here we click on indicators and we search Reben.
When you click on this indicator, 4 moving averages are added to the chart.
But this is not what we want and we need to change their settings.
So here we go to the settings of the Reben and first we remove one of them because we need 3 moving averages and 3 of them should be exponential moving averages.
So here we set EMA for them.
Here for the first EMA we set the length at 13.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
